profile_summary: Solo traveler (mid budget) prioritizing local culture, central location.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Court, Mexico City ranks #1 for this traveler on local culture (+0.87), central location (+0.92), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Great bars and clubs right around the corner, perfect for a night out."

supporting_evidence.quote: Great bars and clubs right around the corner, perfect for a night out.
On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
Buzzing area after dark with plenty of lively spots within walking distance.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Continental, Tokyo ranks #2 for this traveler on local culture (+0.85), central location (+0.90), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes."

supporting_evidence.quote: On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
Loved that it sat in a genuine local neighborhood, not a tourist bubble.
Great base for experiencing the real culture — artisans and street food all around.

recommendations.justification: The Regent Harbour, San Francisco ranks #3 for this traveler on local culture (+0.78), central location (+0.91), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Loved that it sat in a genuine local neighborhood, not a tourist bubble."

supporting_evidence.quote: Loved that it sat in a genuine local neighborhood, not a tourist bubble.
Just steps from a beautiful stretch of beach with loungers ready.
Great base for experiencing the real culture — artisans and street food all around.
